title: Qamus rich-hover CANDIDATE (parser-backed, review-only, feeds the certification queue)
description: A reviewable rich-hover candidate packet generated deterministically from a SOURCE-ADDRESSED token: a morphosyntax-token-shaped token (decision_state=rich_candidate) + the fusha_check verdict/issues + a gate + a blocker_status + a suggested_next_action that routes INTO the existing certification queue (validate_rich_hover_certification). It is NEVER live-applied and NEVER rich_certified — the renderer is not owner-authorized for this layer. Identity stays exact quran:S:A:W + wbw:S:A:W; parse_key is a grammar-family key, never identity, and is suppressed off-spine. Public fields are source-clean {src:qamus,kind:authored,lang:en}. Segment roles bind to the morphosyntax-token role enum; qg classes bind to the qamus-grammar-v1 palette enum — neither may be invented. See parserplans/general-fusha-grammar-checker/{021,014,022}.

scope.description: A candidate is generated ONLY for source-addressed tokens; arbitrary text gets diagnostics, not candidates.

card_address.description: The example-card / entry edge the token was selected from (e.g. qamus:<id>#usage=S:A). Source-address graph edge.

token_address.description: The selected word's exact Qurʾān token address S:A:W.

surface.description: The Arabic token surface (== displayed_surface). Carried for compatibility with the rich-hover ecosystem's segment-surface-exactness invariant: segments concatenate to surface exactly.

displayed_surface.description: The Arabic token as displayed, whitespace-free, byte-for-byte unaltered.

display_local_to_canonical_crosswalk.description: Records a display-local hover slot vs canonical S:A:W mismatch + the crosswalk, or null when they agree.

decision_state.description: ALWAYS rich_candidate. This layer never sets rich_certified (D8) and never applies live.

segments.description: Token-internal segments (proclitic* stem enclitic*). Surfaces concatenate to displayed_surface exactly; a clitic/preposition/pronoun is NEVER collapsed into the host.

gloss_contribution.description: What this segment contributes to the English. null for the stem when carried by token_gloss; a function segment must contribute or the row is pending.

qg_segment_classes.description: Display color/role classes, one per segment, from the qamus-grammar-v1 palette ONLY. Never invent a class; map an unsupported fact to the nearest supported class and park the fact in parse_key.summary / segment role / learner_route.

key.description: Compact ASCII grammar-family key (e.g. P:BI+N:GEN). Source-clean. NOT identity, and NOT a parse:hex family id (suppressed off owner-gated cert).

summary.description: Short authored parse summary for a tooltip.

hover_title.description: Short authored title for the hover card. Source-clean.

token_gloss.description: Concise authored English token contribution. Source-clean, authored from scratch. PENDING tokens carry an explicit blocker, never a guessed gloss.

token_contribution_explanation.description: One sentence: what each Arabic piece contributes (so a phrase translation is never used as a token gloss). Source-clean.

parser_issues.description: The grammar issues from fusha_check for this token (each MUST route). Empty when the candidate is clean/grounded.

gate.description: The candidate's overall gate (canonical GP0 4-tier via GATE_ALIAS).

blocker_status.description: Exact pending/blocked reason, or null when the candidate is clean. A non-clean verdict MUST carry a blocker_status.

suggested_next_action.description: Where the rollout/cert thread should take this candidate next. NEVER 'apply live'.

$comment: Light structural gate (the repo mini-validator checks top-level + item type/enum/const/pattern/required/additionalProperties). The hard FAIL conditions live in tools/validate_rich_hover_candidate.py: source address present; exact token/card edge; correct const public_boundary; no public leak (FC.LEAK_RE); qg class in enum (enforced here too); no phrase-translation-as-token without token_contribution; no collapsed clitic/prep/pronoun; every parser issue routes; iʿrāb/governor-sensitive never auto_safe without evidence; routable to a lane; round-trips into validate_rich_hover_certification.
